panels.description: Wide shot: A group of weary soldiers and pack camels struggling up a steep, rocky mountain path covered in loose shale. The atmosphere is tense with exertion, dramatic lighting capturing the dust kicked up by their boots, dynamic perspective showing the slope's incline.

bubbles.text: As we scramble up the hill, the path lost in rolling stones, we push forward. It's our delight on a mountain height, with a leg or two to spare!

panels.description: Medium shot: A battle-worn sergeant gesturing forward with a frustrated expression, looking back at the struggling column. Harsh shadows emphasize his lined face.

bubbles.text: Good luck to every sergeant that lets us pick our road; Bad luck to all the driver-men that cannot pack a load!

panels.description: Medium close-up: A line of camels with long, wrinkled necks, mid-bray, looking exhausted. Dust swirls in the air. The feeling is one of chaotic, rhythmic frustration.

bubbles.text: Can't! Don't! Sha'n't! Won't! Urr! Yarrh! Grr! Arrh!

panels.description: Wide panoramic shot: The massive, snake-like caravan of camels and weary men stretching across the vast, barren plain toward a distant horizon. Low, desaturated lighting, high-angle view showing the collective scale of their suffering and resolve.

bubbles.text: Children of the Camp are we... Serving each in his degree. While men that walk beside, dusty and heavy-eyed, march and suffer day by day.
